turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f4e4bc" />
  
  <!-- The Castle (Top Tier) -->
  <path d="M200 150 L312 150 L312 100 L280 100 L280 80 L232 80 L232 100 L200 100 Z" fill="#555" />
  <rect x="240" y="120" width="32" height="30" fill="#333" />
  
  <!-- The Pyramid Structure -->
  <!-- King/Crown -->
  <path d="M256 40 L270 70 L242 70 Z" fill="gold" />
  
  <!-- Hierarchy Tiers -->
  <!-- Tier 1: Nobles/Knights -->
  <path d="M180 250 L332 250 L350 320 L162 320 Z" fill="#8b4513" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />
  <circle cx="210" cy="285" r="10" fill="#ccc" />
  <circle cx="256" cy="285" r="10" fill="#ccc" />
  <circle cx="302" cy="285" r="10" fill="#ccc" />

  <!-- Tier 2: Peasants/Serfs -->
  <path d="M120 350 L392 350 L430 460 L82 460 Z" fill="#a0522d" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" />
  <circle cx="150" cy="400" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="200" cy="400" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="256" cy="400" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="312" cy="400" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="362" cy="400" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="180" cy="430" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="256" cy="430" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />
  <circle cx="332" cy="430" r="8" fill="#5d4037" />

  <!-- Arrows indicating land/protection exchange -->
  <path d="M220 160 Q150 200 190 240" fill="none" stroke="#2e7d32" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)" />
  <path d="M292 240 Q362 200 312 160" fill="none" stroke="#1565c0" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)" />
  
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="0" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L9,3 z" fill="#000" />
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
